prestazioni: Audi-sourced 4.2L V8 (engine code: **4200cc FSI - BYH**) forced-induction conversion via **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbocharger** (1.2 bar peak boost) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675 CEA billet compressor wheel** for 680+ HP at 7,800 RPM on **VP Racing Fuels MR6 (118 octane) custom blend**

**Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors** and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 high-flow injectors** (1,200cc/min) for precise lambda control, complemented by a **Pectel SQ6M dash logger** for real-time telemetry monitoring

**H&R Monoball spherical bearing subframe collars** and **AP Racing CP8450-4000 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** with **380mm DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors** (grooved, zinc-coated) for LM-spec endurance braking, paired with **Ohlins TTX40 MkII coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping) and **SPC Performance adjustable camber plates** for Nürburgring Nordschleife optimization
estetica: **RML Group LM-GTE aero package** (carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and **3D-printed Gurney flap** for 220kg downforce at 250 km/h), finished in **Standox 'Spyker Orange' custom pearlescent paint** with **3M Scotchlite 980CR retroreflective striping** for FIA endurance visibility compliance

**BBS LM-RS II 19x11.5 (front) / 20x13 (rear) forged wheels** (ET25/ET15) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30 ZR19 front, 345/25 ZR20 rear)** with **Hankook Ventus TD track-day rubber** as a secondary set, featuring **custom Spyker-branded center caps** and **Dazzling Blue anodized wheel bolts**

**Recaro SPG XL LM Carbon Kevlar seats** (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth Profi II-6 ASM 6-point harnesses**, paired with a **MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel** (350mm diameter, Alcantara-wrapped) and **custom CNC-machined aluminum shift paddles** (anodized in Spyker's signature 'Aileron Silver')
